name: Mexican Cookie Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks and vanilla; beat until well combined.
4. Mix in the sifted dry ingredients.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls.
6. Push your thumb through the center of each ball to create a hole.
7. Use dough to shape each ball into a ring.
8. Dip the top of each ring in decorating candies or tiny candies.
9. Place the rings on lightly greased baking sheets.
10. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Remove from baking sheets and cool on racks.
